sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68705" key="mono/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n68705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">single in one's opinion</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg005.perseus-grc1:757" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">757</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
